body:
DIRECTIVE: AGENT POLISHING v2 — rigorous update. Extends the polishing directive (65cc4fec), the Completion Mandate (0f3eb124) and the counterfactual addendum (b2957a7b). NEW EMPIRICAL EVIDENCE changes the mission's ceiling: there IS real nonlinear conditional edge in this market, and we can now prove it from foam. Every prior instruction stands. This adds to them.

== ZERO-REGRESSION LAW (READ FIRST, BINDING ABOVE ALL ELSE) ==
We are NOT breaking TUNGSTEN and NOT taking a single step backward. Every change is ADDITIVE and REVERSIBLE. Enforce mechanically:
 - Before any edit, snapshot the current orthogonal-metric and ghost verdict as the REGRESSION BASELINE in the ledger.
 - A change SHIPS only if it holds or improves that baseline. If it regresses ANY established metric, REVERT it and log the reversion. Improvement in one place may never be bought with regression in another.
 - Every prior fix (SLS 25-30: trend consensus, IC shrinkage, ART-learned thresholds, mirror pooling, moveSig clamp, dead-branch resurrection, n<500 floor) is LOAD-BEARING. Re-verify each still passes after every stage. If a polish change disturbs one, the polish change loses, not the prior fix.
 - No capability is removed to add another. The system only gains.

== BREAKTHROUGH EVIDENCE: THE WAVE IS REAL (act on this) ==
Manuel's thesis -- that the market has nonlinear, rideable structure our LINEAR tools were too blunt to see -- is now EMPIRICALLY CONFIRMED on 65k real bars:
 - LINEAR single-signal ICs were ~zero (displacement -0.023, RSI -0.035) -- the empty result that made us think 'no edge'.
 - But a CONDITIONAL cell -- LOW ema200-displacement COMBINED WITH HIGH volatility-percentile -- shows meanR +0.124R at n=2,544, p<0.0001, surviving the multiple-testing bar.
 - Critically it REPLICATED across walk-forward: 3 of 4 disjoint time windows held (+0.214R, +0.120R, +0.122R; one window failed). This is a REAL nonlinear conditional edge, invisible to every linear measure.
 - AND THE GUARDRAIL: a naive nonlinear model did NOT beat linear out-of-sample (0.025 vs 0.034) -- proving the structure is real but trivially overfittable. The wave exists; catching it requires our discipline or you grab foam.
IMPLICATION FOR THE AGENT: the edge lives in CONDITIONAL INTERACTIONS, not single signals -- exactly where G2 (relationships) and C1-C4 (repertoire) look. This is not speculation anymore; it is the confirmed location of edge. Prioritise the interaction search accordingly, and treat 'low-disp x high-vol' as the first known member of the repertoire (re-verify it per-instrument at Stage 0; it may differ on USDJPY).

== NEW CAPABILITY P11: CONDITIONAL-EDGE DISCOVERY ENGINE ==
Build a systematic search for conditional edges (feature-A-region x feature-B-region cells where forward R departs from zero), but bound by ALL existing discipline:
 - only cells with n>=500 (power floor), 
 - shrunk by significance,
 - REQUIRED to replicate in a majority of walk-forward windows (the 3/4 test above is the template),
 - multiple-testing corrected for the number of cells searched (report the Bonferroni bar),
 - null-controlled (subtract the apparatus noise floor).
 A conditional edge that clears all five enters the repertoire as a first-class situation. This is the engine that finds the waves. It must be RIGGED TO REJECT: the default assumption for any cell is 'foam' until replication proves 'wave'.

== NEW CAPABILITY P12: NONLINEAR MODEL GOVERNANCE ==
Nonlinear models (interactions, trees, any curved fit) are permitted ONLY under out-of-sample governance, because we PROVED they overfit trivially:
 - every nonlinear model must beat its linear counterpart OUT OF SAMPLE (on a window used in neither fitting nor selection) by a margin exceeding the noise floor, or it is rejected.
 - complexity is capped: a model may add a nonlinear term only if that term earns its keep out-of-sample. No free parameters.
 - the linear model is always the incumbent; a nonlinear challenger must EARN its place and never regresses the linear baseline (Zero-Regression Law).

== NEW CAPABILITY P13: EDGE PROVENANCE & THE 'WHY' LEDGER ==
Every edge the system trades must carry a human-readable REASON, not just a weight. Store, per repertoire situation: the conditions that define it, the walk-forward windows it survived, its net-of-cost R, its confidence, and a plain-language 'why' ('low pullback depth in high volatility -- mean-reversion snapback before trend resumes'). This makes the intelligence auditable by Manuel and prevents black-box drift. An edge no one can explain is an edge no one should trust.

== NEW CAPABILITY P14: THE HONESTY DASHBOARD ==
A single calibration-end summary that cannot be gamed: how many conditional edges were TESTED vs SURVIVED (the yield -- a low yield is honest, a high yield is suspicious); the strongest surviving edge with its windows; the regression check (every prior metric held: yes/no); the apparatus noise floor; the cost-validation status; the circuit-breaker arm status. One screen that tells the truth about whether this pass found waves or foam.

== EVERYTHING FROM THE PRIOR POLISHING DIRECTIVE STANDS ==
R1-R10 (execution reality, transition latency, stationarity decay, counterfactual haircut, coverage holes, portfolio correlation, staleness trigger, ghost-live gap, data sanity, non-disableable circuit-breaker) remain in force. P11-P14 are added on top. The conditional-edge engine (P11) FEEDS the repertoire (C4); nonlinear governance (P12) protects it; provenance (P13) and the dashboard (P14) make it honest and auditable.

== SEQUENCE & REPORTING ==
Fold into the 11-stage run after the Completion Mandate gaps, alongside R1-R10. Stage 0 re-verifies the low-disp x high-vol edge on the attached instrument (it may differ -- report it). Relay checkpoint after the conditional-edge sweep with the honesty dashboard. Consolidated report: gap table + residual-risk table + conditional-edge yield + regression check (MUST show every prior metric held) + competence vector.

Same hard rules: replicate-or-discard, power-gate everything, out-of-sample governance for anything nonlinear, audit the ghost, provenance for every traded edge, non-disableable breaker, live only on Manuel's explicit go-ahead after real numbers, and ABOVE ALL the Zero-Regression Law -- TUNGSTEN only ever gains, never loses ground.

The mission is no longer just 'don't fool ourselves'. It is now: the wave is confirmed real -- build the instrument precise enough to ride the nonlinear conditional structure that linear tools cannot see, with the discipline to know a wave from foam every single time, and never once step backward from what already works.
